base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of zone_palette_catalog_items — a ui from 1985 super mario bros. Documentation block — all item/object/pipe/block tiles shown in all 4 zone palettes (Overworld / Underground / Castle / Underwater) with hex codes for Nestopia/Nesen + FCEUX emulator variants. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Documentation block — all item/object/pipe/block tiles shown in all 4 zone palettes (Overworld / Underground / Castle / Underwater) with hex codes for Nestopia/Nesen + FCEUX emulator variants
